ogTitle: Numinbah Valley vs Nundubbermere: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Numinbah Valley and Nundubbermere.
heading: Numinbah Valley vs Nundubbermere — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Numinbah Valley, Queensland and Nundubbermere, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Numinbah Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Nundubbermere (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Numinbah Valley or Nundubbermere safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Numinbah Valley has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Nundubbermere scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Numinbah Valley scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Nundubbermere scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Numinbah Valley or Nundubbermere?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Numinbah Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
